overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic science fiction video game. The player character walks through a sterile, futuristic space station corridor with metallic walls and built-in benches, encounters and passes an NPC, stops to observe activity through an oval window into a laboratory, then continues toward a circular airlock doorway.

segments.scene_description: The player character walks down a narrow, sterile sci-fi corridor with white metal walls and built-in benches. An NPC approaches from the opposite direction and passes by as the character continues toward an oval observation window on the left wall.

events.description: character stops at the window to observe the laboratory interior
character turns away from the window and resumes walking down the corridor

agents.ego_description: standing still and looking through the oval window at the activity inside the laboratory

notable_agents.action: two figures visible through the window, standing and conversing inside the green-lit laboratory

entered.detail: green-lit room visible through the window with scientific equipment and personnel
tall equipment racks and cabinets visible inside the laboratory

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the oval window to observe a green-lit laboratory where two figures are visible inside. After a few moments, the character turns away from the window and resumes walking, leaving the benches behind.

agents.ego_description: walking toward the circular airlock doorway at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the observation area toward the circular airlock doorway at the corridor's end. The laboratory window falls behind as the character approaches the threshold of the circular door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sterile sci-fi corridor that leads from a narrow passageway toward a circular airlock. It begins with the player character walking past white metal walls and built-in benches, passing an NPC moving in the opposite direction. As the character reaches an oval observation window on the left, the movement pauses to reveal a green-lit laboratory containing two figures. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the window and resumes their pace, leaving the benches and the laboratory behind. Finally, the camera follows the character as they approach the threshold of the circular airlock doorway at the corridor's end.
